resources.string: Legado needs storage access to find and read books. Please go "App Settings" to allow "Storage Permission".
Export to local and back up to the exports directory under the legado folder
Enter a valid number between -1 and 1
The bookshelf is still empty. Search for books or add them from discovery!
Some settings related to interface or color
Fine-tune fonts and other appearance details
Manage, import, and export complete theme packs
It has not been saved. Do you want to continue editing?
Do not overwrite the book type when the book updates
Would you like to add %s to your Bookshelf?
Editing Sources or Reading Books via Web
Edit book sources on the web
Cache the selected chapter(s) to Storage
\u3000\u3000 This is an open source reading software newly developed by Kotlin, welcome to join us.
You can operate freely when verifying the book source
Update books automatically when opening the software
Download the latest chapters automatically when updating books
The new backup files will replace the original.\n Backup folder: YueDu
Restoring the bookshelf data will overwrite the current Bookshelf.
WebDAV error\n%1$s\nRestore from a local backup instead.
Hide system navigation bar when reading
Clearing the cache will delete all saved chapters. Are you sure to delete it?
Pattern rule is empty or does not conform the regex specification.
Controls concurrent download tasks. Higher values increase OOM risk
Controls concurrent chapter downloads for offline book cache. Higher values increase OOM risk
No content.Go to Sources management to add it!
Darken the status bar\'s icon color
This is a test text, \n\u3000\u3000 just to show you the effect
Long tap to input color value
It will delete all books. Be careful,please.
Please install and select Chinese TTS!
Please put the font files in the Fonts folder of the storage root directory and reselect
Replacement object. Book name or source URL is available
Volume Keys to Turn Page When Reading
When the body length is too long, it may take more time to load the text.
Display the selected origin\'s Discovery if closed
Choose some chapters to be exported
The status bar color becomes transparent
Update the latest chapter after changed origin in the background
If enabled,the update will start 1 minute later when the software is run
The toolbar will be hidden automatically when scroll the Bookshelf
The current source has not configured with a login address
Enter the custom source group name
Tap to display menu when selected
Set the background image requires storage permission
Are you sure to delete this file?
Import local books requires storage permission
Tap again to exit the program
Import local books requires storage permission
Are you sure to delete it?
Are you sure to delete all books？
Do you want to delete the downloaded book chapters at the same time?
Scan QR code requires Camera permissions
Speech is running, cannot turn pages automatically
Open local books requires storage permission
name and URL cannot be empty
Opening the homepage, it will return to start page automatically after success
After successful login, please tap the icon on the upper right corner to test the homepage access
No Discovery, you can add it in BookSource
Custom cache path requires Storage permission
Remove animations and optimize the experience of using E-paper books
The input content cannot be empty
Switch the software icon displayed on the desktop
There are too many words to create a QR code
Starting service\nChecking notification bar for details
Android 10+ unable to read and write file due to permission restrictions
Show “Read · Search” in Text Selection Menu
The icon is a vector icon, which was not supported before Android 8.0

Legado needs Storage Permission, please tap the "Grant Permission" button below, or go to "Settings"-"Application Permissions"-to open the required permission. If the permission is still not work, please tap "Select Folder" in the upper right corner to use the system folder picker.
The selected text cannot be spoken in full text speech
Headset buttons are available even exit the app.
Backup the local and WebDAV simultaneously
Choose sync behavior for automatic backup
Choose to restore from local or network backup
This book is already in Download list
Follow [Open Source Reading] to support me by clicking on ads
gedoor,Invinciblelee,Xwite etc. Checking in github for details
Clear the cache of the downloaded books and fonts
Day background can not be too dark!
Day bottom can not be too dark!
Night background can not be too bright!
Night bottom can not be too bright!
Need Difference between accent and background color
Need Difference between accent and text color
Your donation makes this app better
Focusing on the input box and pressing a physical key will automatically enter the value of the key, and multiple keys will be automatically separated by commas.
Search histories more than one day
Click the folder icon in the upper right corner and select the folder
Add the rule import address provided by the bosses\nClick to import rules after adding
The current progress exceeds the cloud progress. Do you want to synchronize?
The cloud progress exceeds the current progress. Do you want to synchronize?
Synchronize reading progress when entering / exiting the reading interface
Sync cloud progress when re-entering the page (e.g., after screen off, returning from background, etc.) or when the network becomes available
Disabled when 0, enable range from 1 to 25\nThe greater the radius, the stronger the effect of blurring
Always show the default cover, do not show the network cover

Available variables: {name} title, {author} author, {group} group, {source} source, {remark} remark.

Example: {name} - {author}
Result: The Three-Body Problem - Liu Cixin

You can add fixed text before or after variables.
Turn off Replace Group / Turn on Add Group
Turning pages in time, with a pause when the page is turned
Check book source shows debug message
Show network status and timestamp during source checking
Clipboard is empty or has an invalid format
Generate Direct URLs for Exported Book Source Lists
Generic Cover Rules and Default Cover Style
Is it opened in an external browser?
Empty search result, check conversation settings
Error opening system folder selector, automatically open application folder selector
Error opening system file selector, automatically open application file selector
Save location for books opened from other apps
Select the folder where the books are saved
Tap to join the Reading QQ channel
Change the source of the whole book
Startup screen image and whether to display text, etc.
Whether to use a customized welcome page
Load network cover only under wifi
Use the cover rule to retrieve the cover when entering the details page
Search URL and cover rule cannot be empty
Navigate to the current book source
Open the system tts settings interface
When the non-playback state is not legal
Whether to confirm the source change
Continue to open although %1$s is not supported ?
Keep the number of chapters read %s
Image URL is empty, check replacement rules
Sliding page turn threshold (0 = system default)
How far to slide to trigger a page slide (system default %s px)
Prompt to Add to Bookshelf When Return
Prompt to add to bookshelf when return from reading books that are not on the bookshelf
Send a reply paragraph comment URL（postQuoteUrl）
Allow audio to be played at the same time as other applications
Maximum Number of Rows in the Source Edit Box
%s,Setting the number of rows less than the maximum number of rows that can be displayed on the screen makes it easier to slide to other fields for editing.
Whether to return to the reading progress before the jump？
Are you sure to clear all search history
The wake-up lock is enabled when the web service is enabled, and some phones will be killed when the wake-up lock is enabled.
The wake-up lock is enabled when reading aloud is enabled, and the wake-up lock on some mobile phones will be killed in the background.
The wake-up lock is enabled when playing audio, and some phones will be killed when the wake-up lock is turned on.
Reading requires sending notifications to show reading control and download progress
The WebDAV book source is newer than the local one. Do you want to restore it?
Cannot find supported files in archive
There is no book save location set!
No book found in bookshelf, import again ?
Can not find archive selected, continue to download ?
Managing files in the application\'s private folder
The local password is used to encrypt and decrypt the sensitive information of the backup, if you need to synchronize between different devices, the local password should be the same.
Local backup keeps only the latest backup file
Exclude range, optional title or source URL
The number of chapters contained in each file
The section index that needs to be exported
Reduce the size of the database file
Display the Number of Pending Updates
Click on the book title to open details
Export book source for all books
Cleared successfully, automatically restarts the application after 3 seconds
Press and Hold the Key to Turn Page
Log recording is off. Turn it on in Other Settings first.
Heap dump recording is off. Turn it on in Other Settings first.
The app crashed. Copy the error information below when reporting the issue.
Saving a heap dump when the application crashes by OOM
Keep swiping to load the next chapter…
Reading requires requesting background permission to keep the service running properly
Look for other signature variants when checking for updates
Play while downloading; may stutter on poor networks. Works only with TTS source
Pause reading aloud during calls, requires phone state permission
Reading requires phone state access to pause reading aloud during calls
Start Read Aloud via Headset Buttons
Use headset buttons to start reading aloud
Theme imported. Some changes require a restart.
Save the current appearance settings as a theme
Export the current theme settings as a JSON file
Import theme settings from a JSON file
Apply theme \"%1$s\"? A restart is required for all changes to take effect.
Delete theme \"%1$s\"? This cannot be undone.
Miuix is currently experimental and does not apply to View-based screens.
Controls the liquid glass distortion strength
Higher blur radius may reduce performance
Allow the app to use Google Firebase for crash and performance reports
Enable if system media controls are missing on lock screen (e.g. OneUI 7.0, OriginOS)
Please read the Terms of Service and User Agreement first.
Set where local books are stored. You can change it later in Settings.
Use Monet to generate the Miuix palette. If the current theme is Dynamic on Android 12+, the system accent is used; otherwise the seed color below is used.
Please set the transparent theme after setting a background image.
Create a theme from a seed color
Use a detached capsule style for the bottom navigation bar
Enable the liquid glass highlight for the floating bar. Requires blur and Android 13+
Optimize the animation effect when entering the reading interface from the bookshelf.
Reduces stutter when entering the reading interface, but increases book loading time.
Generate theme colors from an image
To use a seed color, clear the selected seed image first
The theme engine depends on Monet. Dynamic colors and custom themes do not take effect on devices below Android 12.
Changing this option requires a restart
Long press to set as the global default mode
A book with the same name already exists
Check for new backups when opening the app, if new backups are found, prompt the user to update.
Source Change Default Applies to Entire Book
Otherwise, Only Applies to Single Chapter.
These options only affect screens rewritten in Compose. Disabled options are placeholders and will be enabled after implementation.
Always Use Underline for Emphasized Text
Start Web Service When App Opens
Current: %1$d. Enter 0 to clear immediately on exit.
No books here. Try global search.
%1$s group search returned no results. Disable precise search?
%1$s group search returned no results. Switch to all groups?
This group already has an infinite loading module
The source\'s homepageModules JSON is empty
This source has no discover items
Are you sure you want to delete this set and all its module copies?
Are you sure you want to remove this module from the current set?
Please add homepage module definitions in the book source
